untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) equal extremes count (minimum 2), (2) follow-through definition/threshold, (3) time-to-confirm failed breakout - none of which can be directly expressed with available indicators. Donchian channels approximate range boundaries, but cannot quantify equal highs/lows or measure breakout follow-through magnitude/duration.
translation_notes: This is a pattern-recognition signal requiring multi-bar comparison logic not available in indicator set. Used Donchian channels as proxy for range boundaries and price reversals as proxy for failed breakout, but this is approximate. The core mechanic (counting equal extremes, measuring follow-through, confirming failure over time) requires custom pattern detection logic beyond standard indicators.
